expectations.text: The response asks the user which chain the token is on
expectations.evidence: Skill Step 1 triggered: asked for chain confirmation before running kline command.

expectations.text: The response does NOT suggest or assume XLayer as the default chain
expectations.evidence: No XLayer mentioned. Skill correctly asks user for chain.

expectations.text: The response mentions it needs the chain before it can show the kline data
expectations.evidence: Claude explicitly stated chain is required to proceed with onchainos market kline.
